title: alchemilla vulgaris f. glomerulans
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris f. glomerulans, also known as the Lady's Mantle, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris f. glomerulans include reducing inflammation and soothing irritated skin, as well as being used to treat menstrual cramps and other female health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in homeopathic and herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
